ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "lot_area" INTEGER /* Lot area of the property in square feet */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "bldg_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of building */,
  "overall_quality" INTEGER /* Overall quality rating of the property (1-10) */,
  "overall_condition" INTEGER /* Overall condition rating of the property (1-10) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "year_remod_add" INTEGER /* Year the property was last remodeled or added to */,
  "mo_sold" INTEGER /* Month the property was sold */,
  "yr_sold" INTEGER /* Year the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Sale price of the property in dollars */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "property_city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "property_state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "property_zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "property_basement_area" INTEGER /* Area of the basement in square feet */,
  "property_garage_area" INTEGER /* Area of the garage in square feet */,
  "property_pool_area" INTEGER /* Area of the pool in square feet */,
  "property_foundation_type" TEXT /* Type of foundation (e.g., slab, basement) */,
  "property_roof_material" TEXT /* Material of the roof (e.g., shingle, metal) */,
  "property_exterior_material" TEXT /* Material of the exterior (e.g., brick, vinyl) */,
  "property_heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system (e.g., gas, electric) */,
  "property_cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system (e.g., central air, window unit) */,
  "property_fireplaces" INTEGER /* Number of fireplaces in the property */,
  "property_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "property_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "property_stories" INTEGER /* Number of stories in the property */,
  "property_garage_cars" INTEGER /* Number of cars the garage can accommodate */,
  "property_pool" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a pool */,
  "property_fenced_yard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a fenced yard */,
  "property_deck" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a deck */,
  "property_patio" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a patio */,
  "property_view" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_bldg_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bldg_type_id") REFERENCES building_types ("bldg_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "neighborhood_description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_schools" TEXT /* List of schools in the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_public_transport" TEXT /* Availability of public transport in the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_parks" TEXT /* List of parks in the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_shopping" TEXT /* List of shopping centers in the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_crime_rate" TEXT /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_zoning" TEXT /* Zoning information for the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_average_property_value" INTEGER /* Average property value in the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_income_level" TEXT /* Average income level of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_types" (
  "bldg_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building type */,
  "bldg_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the building type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building type */,
  "bldg_type_average_square_feet" INTEGER /* Average square footage for this building type */,
  "bldg_type_average_value" INTEGER /* Average value of properties of this building type */,
  "bldg_type_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the building type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bldg_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "mo_sold" INTEGER /* Month the property was sold */,
  "yr_sold" INTEGER /* Year the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Sale price of the property in dollars */,
  "sale_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate agent who handled the sale */,
  "sale_buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "sale_seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "sale_commission" INTEGER /* Commission earned by the agent */,
  "sale_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Number of days the property was on the market before sale */,
  "sale_market_conditions" TEXT /* Market conditions at the time of sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_sale_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_sale_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_sale_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the property data */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the property data was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
